MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paolini-Mori for Ignacio Escudero.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to May 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a further declaration/evidence addressing presumption of revocation. Said declaration/evidence is to be filed by May 22, 2014.
